allow: Bash(python -c "import json; j=json.load\(open\('offices/pm/backlog.json'\)\); e10=[e for e in j['epics'] if e['id']=='E-10'][0]; print\(f'Epic: {e10[\\"name\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  {f[\\"id\\"]}: {f[\\"title\\"]} — {len\(f[\\"stories\\"]\)} stories'\) for f in e10['features']]; print\(f'Stats: {j[\\"statistics\\"]}'\)")
